title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 242.670 - Limited appeal from assessments
text:
242.670.  Limited appeal from assessments. — No appeal from any action of the circuit court had under sections 242.010 to 242.690 shall be permitted to act as supersedeas or to delay any action or the prosecution of any work begun under the provisions of this law.
(RSMo 1939 § 12360) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10779; 1919 § 4412
